## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other information, mockups, or references that might help.
